summary: Completed comprehensive testing of THC (The Healthtech Collective) multi-page marketing website. All 7 pages functional with proper navigation, API integration working, partner form submission successful, and mobile responsiveness confirmed.
passed_tests: All 7 navigation links working (Home, Who It's For, Events, Community, About, Partner, Join)
Home page hero section with CTA buttons functional
Home page stakeholder cards grid (5 cards) rendering correctly
Home page gallery images loading properly
Events page API integration (GET /api/events) working
Events page upcoming/past toggle functionality working
Events page showing 6 event format cards and event listings
Join page 4 pricing tier cards displaying correctly
Join page FAQ accordion (5 items) expand/collapse working
Join page comparison table rendering
Partner form submission (POST /api/partner-inquiry) successful with toast notification
Partner form validation and success flow working
Who It's For page stakeholder tabs (5 types) all clickable and functional
About page team member cards (3 members) displaying
Community page stats section and join button working
Footer rendering with navigation links and social icons
Mobile responsiveness - hamburger menu toggle working
Backend API endpoints all functional (6/6 tests passed)
Events data properly filtered by upcoming/past status
Partner inquiry form validation working correctly
